title: Morning Push-Up Blitz
description: Complete 30 push-ups before you look at your phone. Do them immediately after waking up. Form matters — chest to floor, full extension.

title: Evening Nature Walk
description: Take a 30-minute walk outside at sunset. No headphones — just nature sounds and your thoughts. Notice 5 beautiful things you see.

title: HIIT Power Session
description: Complete 4 rounds of: 20 burpees, 30 mountain climbers, 15 jump squats, 60s plank. Rest 90 seconds between rounds. Push your limits!

title: 10K Run Challenge
description: Run 10 kilometers without stopping. Pace yourself — the first 5km should feel comfortable. Track your time and beat it next week.

title: Strength Circuit
description: 3 sets of: 12 pull-ups, 20 dips, 15 dumbbell rows, 12 shoulder press, 20 lunges. Rest 2 min between sets. Focus on slow, controlled movements.

title: Morning Yoga Flow
description: Complete a 20-minute yoga flow: sun salutations, warrior poses, downward dog, child's pose. Hold each pose for 5 full breaths. Breathe deeply.

title: Pomodoro Sprint
description: Complete 4 Pomodoro sessions (25 min work, 5 min break). Pick ONE important task and work only on that. No social media. No distractions.

title: Inbox Zero Mission
description: Clear your entire email inbox to zero. Archive, respond, delete, or delegate every single email. Set up folders for future organization.

title: Deep Work Block
description: Work for 4 uninterrupted hours on your most important project. Phone in another room, website blockers on, door closed. Full focus mode.

title: Weekly Power Planning
description: Plan your entire next week in detail: set 3 major goals, schedule all important tasks, block time for health and rest. Create a visual schedule.

title: Phone-Free Morning
description: Don't touch your phone for the first 2 hours of your day. Instead: exercise, journal, plan your day, eat mindfully. No exceptions!

title: Launch Your Project
description: Take a project idea you've been sitting on and launch it today. It doesn't have to be perfect — just published, live, and shared with 3 people.

title: Read 20 Pages
description: Read 20 pages of a non-fiction book without distractions. After finishing, write a 3-sentence summary of what you learned.

title: Learn 10 New Words
description: Learn 10 new vocabulary words from a foreign language or your field of interest. Write them, their meaning, and use each in a sentence.

title: Complete a Video Lecture
description: Watch a full lecture or course module (at least 45 mins) on a technical skill. Take notes by hand. Test yourself at the end with 5 questions.

title: Teach What You Know
description: Teach something you've recently learned to another person — a friend, family member, or online community. The best way to learn is to teach.

title: Research Deep Dive
description: Spend 3 hours researching one topic thoroughly. Read at least 5 sources, take detailed notes, and produce a 1-page summary of your findings.

title: Master a New Skill
description: Dedicate an entire day to learning a brand new skill from scratch. By end of day you should be able to demonstrate the basics to someone else.

title: Bug Squasher
description: Find and fix a bug in your codebase or in an open-source project. Document what caused it and how you fixed it. Write a test to prevent regression.

title: Build a UI Component
description: Build a reusable UI component from scratch: a custom modal, dropdown, or date picker. Make it fully accessible and responsive with clean code.

title: Algorithm Challenge
description: Solve 2 LeetCode or HackerRank problems — one easy and one medium difficulty. Explain your approach and time complexity in a comment.

title: Build a REST API
description: Build a complete REST API with at least 5 endpoints, authentication, input validation, and documentation. Deploy it to a cloud service.

title: Open Source Contribution
description: Submit a pull request to an open source repository. Fix a real issue, add a feature, or improve documentation. Get it merged or reviewed.

title: Full App in a Day
description: Build and deploy a complete web application in one day. It must have a frontend, backend, and database. Share the live URL when done.

title: Daily Sketch
description: Spend 20 minutes sketching anything — an object near you, a person, a fantasy creature, or an abstract shape. Focus on observation over perfection.

title: Poem Challenge
description: Write a poem — at least 12 lines — about something you experienced this week. Share it with someone or post it online.

title: Photo Story
description: Tell a story through 10 photographs taken today. No editing allowed — just composition. Write a one-sentence caption for each photo.

title: Design a Logo
description: Design a logo for a fictional company using any tool (Figma, Canva, pen+paper). Create 3 variations and explain your design choices.

title: Short Film Challenge
description: Film, edit, and publish a 2-3 minute short film or video essay. Could be a time-lapse, a tutorial, a vlog, or a creative story.

title: Build Something Physical
description: Build a physical object with your hands — woodworking, sewing, LEGO, origami, ceramics, etc. Document the process and share the result.

title: 5-Minute Meditation
description: Sit comfortably, close your eyes, focus only on your breath for 5 minutes. When your mind wanders, gently return to the breath. No apps needed.

title: Gratitude Journal
description: Write 10 specific things you are grateful for today. Don't repeat previous entries. Include why each one matters to you personally.

title: Digital Detox Hour
description: Spend 1 hour completely disconnected from all devices. Go outside, read a physical book, or talk to someone in person. Notice how it feels.

title: Cold Shower Challenge
description: Take a full cold shower for at least 2 minutes. Start warm if needed, then switch to cold. Focus on controlled breathing throughout.

title: Body Scan Meditation
description: Do a 20-minute body scan meditation: lie down, scan from toes to head, noticing sensations without judgment. Release tension in each body part.

title: 7-Day Meditation Streak
description: Meditate for at least 10 minutes every day for 7 consecutive days. Track each session. By day 7, write about what you noticed changing.
